title: Parse Anthropic-Messages-style response in compile client
forbidden_changes: Sending Authorization alongside x-api-key for Anthropic providers
Removing or weakening the OpenAI-style video_url block path
deliverables: extract_response_text helper in compile/client.rs that dispatches on provider_kind: Anthropic-style top-level content[] for ProviderKind::Anthropic, OpenAI-style choices[0].message.content (with reasoning_content/reasoning fallbacks) for everything else
compile_chunk_video uses extract_response_text instead of inline parser
6 new unit tests covering Anthropic single-block, multi-block concatenation, tool-use block skipping, empty content, OpenAI message.content path, OpenAI reasoning fallback
acceptance_tests: Real MiniMax M3 Anthropic-style response shape (top-level content[].text) is correctly extracted
security_requirements: Non-text blocks (e.g. tool_use) are ignored so untrusted model output cannot inject executable content into the JSON repair stage
